name: Create_Construction_File
description:
Generate either (1) a full DNA cloning construction file, (2) a structured paper information resource, or (3) a shorthand construction workflow derived from a paper. Always choose the correct input_mode before calling this tool.

IMPORTANT:
- For input_mode='paper_shorthand', ALWAYS provide paper_id only unless paper_info_json is explicitly available.
- Do NOT manually extract or pass partial paper fields for paper_shorthand.
- The tool will internally load the full paper information using paper_id.

For input_mode='sequence_build', gather ALL required fields for the selected assembly_strategy before calling. NEVER pass placeholder text such as '[MISSING]' or 'Please provide...' into any field.

Assembly strategies:
- GoldenGate: PCR insert + PCR vector + Golden Gate assembly. Requires insert/vector primer names and sequences plus enzyme.
- Gibson: PCR insert + PCR vector + Gibson assembly. Requires insert/vector primer names and sequences.
- TypeIISOligoCloning: direct cloning of annealed top/bottom oligos into a Type IIS-digested vector. Requires top_oligo_name, top_oligo_sequence, bottom_oligo_name, bottom_oligo_sequence, backbone_name, backbone_sequence, and enzyme. Does NOT require insert_sequence or PCR primers.

inputs.name: input_mode
inputs.description: Mode of operation. Options: 'sequence_build', 'paper_info', or 'paper_shorthand'.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Name of the final construct. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: assembly_strategy
inputs.description: Assembly strategy for sequence_build. Options: 'GoldenGate', 'Gibson', or 'TypeIISOligoCloning'.

inputs.name: backbone_name
inputs.description: Backbone plasmid name. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: backbone_sequence
inputs.description: Backbone DNA sequence, resource name, resource URI, or local FASTA/GenBank path. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: insert_name
inputs.description: Insert name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson sequence_build workflows.

inputs.name: insert_sequence
inputs.description: Insert DNA sequence, resource name, resource URI, or local FASTA/GenBank path. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson. Not required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert forward primer name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert forward primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector forward primer name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector forward primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: top_oligo_name
inputs.description: Top oligo name. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: top_oligo_sequence
inputs.description: Top oligo DNA sequence. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: bottom_oligo_name
inputs.description: Bottom oligo name. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: bottom_oligo_sequence
inputs.description: Bottom oligo DNA sequence. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: enzyme
inputs.description: Restriction or assembly enzyme. Required for GoldenGate and TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: cell_strain
inputs.description: Optional transformation host strain.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Optional selection marker.

inputs.name: temperature_c
inputs.description: Optional transformation temperature in Celsius.

inputs.name: paper_id
inputs.description: Required for paper-based modes. Identifier for a curated paper resource. The tool will load the full paper internally.

inputs.name: paper_info_json
inputs.description: Optional full paper information object returned from get_paper_info. If provided, it will be used directly instead of reloading.

outputs.description: A structured construction file or shorthand workflow. For paper_shorthand, output may be either standard workflow or protocol-style shorthand depending on the paper.
